welcome.title: Welcome to nutriFlow
welcome.subtitle: Track your meals, monitor your macros, and progress every day.

macros.summary:
nutriFlow Daily Summary

Calories: {{calories}}
Protein: {{protein}}g
Carbs: {{carbs}}g
Fat: {{fat}}g

Meals: {{count}} logged today

addMeal.title: Add Meal
addMeal.errorMessage: Please enter a meal name and calories.
addMeal.saveErrorMessage: The meal could not be saved. Try again or remove the photo.
addMeal.aiDisclaimer: AI estimate — please verify before saving
addMeal.cameraPermissionMessage: Camera access is needed to take meal photos.
addMeal.analysisErrorMessage: Could not analyze the photo. Please enter macros manually.
addMeal.apiNotConfiguredMessage: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_ANALYZE_API_URL to enable AI analysis. You can still add the photo manually.
addMeal.unauthorizedMessage: The app is not authorized to use the analysis API.
addMeal.imageTooLargeMessage: Please choose a smaller photo (max 2 MB).
addMeal.rateLimitedMessage: You have reached the daily scan limit. Try again tomorrow or enter macros manually.
addMeal.aiQuotaMessage: The AI service quota has been reached. Please try again in a few minutes or enter macros manually.
addMeal.authRequiredMessage: Sign in to scan meals with AI. You can still log meals manually.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in to unlock AI meal scanning and keep your data in sync.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.missingCredentials: Please enter your email and password.
auth.signUpErrorMessage: Unable to create the account. Check your details.
auth.signUpSuccessMessage: Check your inbox if confirmation is required, then sign in.
auth.oauthErrorMessage: Social sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.oauthSessionErrorMessage: Google sign-in could not be completed. Check the redirect URL in Supabase, then try again.
auth.callbackErrorMessage: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
auth.notConfiguredMessage: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable sign-in.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Open it to activate your account.
verifyEmail.stepInbox: Open your inbox and look for the nutriFlow confirmation email.
verifyEmail.stepSpam: If you do not see it, check your spam or promotions folder.
verifyEmail.stepConfirm: Tap the confirmation link, then return here and sign in.
verifyEmail.oauthNote: Google sign-in does not require email confirmation. This step only applies to email and password accounts.
verifyEmail.openMailUnavailable: No mail app found on this device.
verifyEmail.resendError: Unable to resend the confirmation email.
verifyEmail.missingEmail: Email address missing. Go back and create your account again.
verifyEmail.goToSignIn: I confirmed my email — sign in

allMeals.title: All Meals
allMeals.duplicateMessage: "{{name}}" is already in your recent meals today. Add it again?
allMeals.favoritesEmpty: No favorite meals yet. Tap the star on a meal in All Meals to add it to your favorites.

mealItem.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

share.noMealsMessage: Log at least one meal to share your daily summary.
share.errorMessage: The image could not be generated. Please try again in a moment.

notifications.lunchReminder: Don't forget to log your lunch!

account.title: Account
account.guestDescription: Sign in to use AI scanning and access your meals across devices.

goals.title: Daily Goals
goals.description: Set your daily macro targets for progress tracking
goals.savedMessage: Your daily macro goals have been updated.

quotes: Every meal is an opportunity to fuel your goals.
Your body deserves the best fuel.
Eat with intention, progress with confidence.
Today, one more step toward your goals.
Nourishing your body is investing in yourself.
Motivation gets you started, habit keeps you going.
Balance and determination make the difference.
Every day counts, every meal too.
Take care of yourself, one meal at a time.
